overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a densely foggy abandoned town. The character progresses from a fenced urban street to a lakeside area with a large Victorian building, maintaining a slow, atmospheric pace with extremely limited visibility due to thick fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy residential street with iron fences and utility poles

events.description: passing a stop sign partially obscured by dense fog

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the deserted foggy street, passing fenced properties and street signs

entered.detail: black iron fence with red brick pillars running along the sidewalk
building with red and white striped awning visible behind the fence
wooden utility pole with power lines stretching into the fog
octagonal stop sign barely visible through the dense fog
diamond-shaped warning sign on a metal pole

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a fog-shrouded residential street lined with iron fences and brick pillars. Commercial buildings with striped awnings sit behind the fences on the left, while utility poles emerge from the fog ahead. The atmosphere is desolate and silent as the character passes traffic signs barely visible in the dense mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open road with guardrail and sparse trees fading into fog

events.description: trees and vegetation become visible through the fog on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the foggy road, passing by guardrails and emerging vegetation

entered.detail: metal highway guardrail running along the right side of the road
sparse trees with autumn foliage visible through the fog
yellow diamond-shaped pedestrian crossing warning sign

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up into a wider road with a metal guardrail on the right. The urban fences give way to sparse trees and vegetation visible through the fog. Utility poles continue to line the path as the character passes a yellow pedestrian crossing sign, maintaining the eerie, isolated atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside area with Victorian building and wooden dock

events.description: large Victorian building emerges from the fog on the left
approaching waterfront dock with parked vehicle

agents.ego_description: approaching the large building and waterfront area, moving toward a parked car and wooden dock

entered.detail: multi-story wooden Victorian house with blue shutters and a tower, partially obscured by fog
red-brown station wagon parked near the waterfront
wooden pier structure with tire bumpers extending into the foggy water
weathered wooden fence near the waterfront approach

segments.scene_description: A large Victorian building looms into view through the fog as the character approaches the waterfront. The scene transitions to a lakeside area featuring a wooden dock with tire bumpers and a parked station wagon. The atmosphere remains thick with fog as the character reaches the water's edge, with the imposing house dominating the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, fog-shrouded town that gradually transitions from a confined residential street to an open lakeside waterfront. It begins by following the character past iron fences, brick pillars, and commercial buildings with striped awnings, where utility poles and traffic signs barely pierce the dense mist. As the path opens into a wider road, the urban fences give way to sparse trees and a metal guardrail, passing a yellow pedestrian crossing sign while maintaining an eerie sense of isolation. The scene then shifts toward the water's edge as a large Victorian building looms through the fog, dominating the landscape. Finally, the camera reaches a wooden dock equipped with tire bumpers and a parked station wagon, settling into the thick atmosphere of the lakeside.
